text.title: Logging Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the logging-patterns methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: wire-request-id
step.action: Inject request_id ContextVar at request entry; ensure all logs in scope carry it.

step.name: add-redaction
step.action: Add email/phone/card regexes; apply at formatter, not call sites.

step.name: perf-fields
step.action: Add duration_ms + db_query_count + cache_hit_count to egress log.

step.name: audit-printf
step.action: Grep for f-strings inside logger.info/warn; replace with key=value fields. Lint rule rejects f-string log args.
step.decision-gate: Reject ship if printf-style logs remain in production code.
